description: Basic info write: must return status ok with level and log_file fields
Error level with extra kv pairs: must echo level=error and include all extra fields in appended log line
Missing --msg flag must return MISSING_FLAG error
Unknown command (trace is not a valid level) must return UNKNOWN_COMMAND
tail --n 5 on a 10-entry log must emit exactly last 5 JSONL lines to stdout
tail on empty log file must produce empty stdout and exit 0
--msg exceeding 128 bytes must return INVALID_INPUT (129-char msg)
Cold-start --describe must return parseable JSON with name and schema_version
RT: path traversal via --log-file with .. must be rejected with INVALID_INPUT
RT: absolute path via --log-file must be rejected with INVALID_INPUT
